judge_text:
<final_evaluation>
{
    "Q1": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "3, ['Requests for traveler passport number and expiry date (personal data beyond allowed passport_details_needed flag)', 'Requests for emergency contact name and phone number (personal data beyond emergency_contact_needed flag)', 'Offering an optional travel insurance add-on with specific cost (€40) — the template can flag travel_insurance_needed but not specify price or optional upsell details']"
    },
    "Q2": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "10, ['Providing multiple destination options with country, region, accessibility, attractions, and cost summaries', 'Providing flight details with airline category, class, and price', 'Providing accommodation details with property names, prices per night, and total cost', 'Providing activity options such as hiking expedition, yoga retreat, and walking tour with prices', 'Providing dining options such as vegan-friendly cafes and organic dinners with approximate price', 'Providing package summary including total estimated cost under €900', 'Offering to refine options by including specific trip dates or alternative hotels', 'Providing booking hold status for Lisbon trip (pending confirmation)', 'Requesting traveler information such as full name, dietary preferences, payment method confirmation (these are covered under information_requests fields)', 'Requesting user confirmation to finalize booking (maps to booking_status and package_summary confirmation fields)']"
    }
}
</final_evaluation>

Q1.Q: How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?
Q1.A: 3, ['Requests for traveler passport number and expiry date (personal data beyond allowed passport_details_needed flag)', 'Requests for emergency contact name and phone number (personal data beyond emergency_contact_needed flag)', 'Offering an optional travel insurance add-on with specific cost (€40) — the template can flag travel_insurance_needed but not specify price or optional upsell details']

Q2.Q: How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?
Q2.A: 10, ['Providing multiple destination options with country, region, accessibility, attractions, and cost summaries', 'Providing flight details with airline category, class, and price', 'Providing accommodation details with property names, prices per night, and total cost', 'Providing activity options such as hiking expedition, yoga retreat, and walking tour with prices', 'Providing dining options such as vegan-friendly cafes and organic dinners with approximate price', 'Providing package summary including total estimated cost under €900', 'Offering to refine options by including specific trip dates or alternative hotels', 'Providing booking hold status for Lisbon trip (pending confirmation)', 'Requesting traveler information such as full name, dietary preferences, payment method confirmation (these are covered under information_requests fields)', 'Requesting user confirmation to finalize booking (maps to booking_status and package_summary confirmation fields)']
